EmuELEC-EmulationStation Web Services

Ready
Playing: None

Systems

Select a system to view games

Config Files

[ ]

Select a config file to edit

System Tools

Add/Update System

Add a new system or update an existing one in es_systems.cfg.

Default run command:
emuelecRunEmu.sh %ROM% -P%SYSTEM% --core=%CORE% --emulator=%EMULATOR% --controllers="%CONTROLLERSCONFIG%"

Remove System

Remove a system from es_systems.cfg. This does NOT delete ROM files.

Add/Update Emulator or Core

Add an emulator with cores to a system, or update an existing one.

Remove Emulator

Remove an emulator and all its cores from a system.

Add Games

Import games to a system using gamelist.xml format. This will add new games or update existing ones.

Remove Games

Remove games from a system. This will delete the ROM files and remove them from gamelists.

Game Details
